stemHtml: The origin of the gust envelope is...

options.a: From the 1G point with associated speeds of 66, 50 and 25 fpm for all aircraft types.
options.b: From the 1G point running through three reference speeds VB, VC and VD.
options.c: From the 0G point and it has the corresponding speeds VB, VC and VD.
options.d: From the 1G point running through four reference speeds VA, VB, VC and VD.
